name: Direct Booking Concierge — Hotel MVP
description: WhatsApp + web AI concierge for independent DR hotels. Webhook -> normalize -> resolve tenant (Supabase) -> GPT-4o agent (structured output) -> respond -> log -> if booking_ready: capture booking + notify front desk.
flow: Normalize Message (Set: guest_contact, tenant_whatsapp, message, channel)
Get Tenant Config (Supabase getAll concierge_tenants where whatsapp_number = tenant_whatsapp)
AI Concierge (langchain agent, GPT-4o + structured output parser)
Reply To Guest (respondToWebhook, returns full agent output object)
-> Capture Direct Booking (Supabase create concierge_bookings, status=pending)
-> Notify Front Desk (Twilio WhatsApp, onError=continueRegularOutput / non-blocking)
notes: Full node definitions are managed in n8n. Re-import via the n8n MCP SDK builder; this file is the human-readable export of the deployed topology.
